dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal captures regime-shift reversal logic: entry conditions detect failed breakouts (price approaches pivot but closes opposite to prior bar with minimal body), indicating failed predictions. Exit conditions trigger when original thesis regains credibility (price crosses SMA_20). Direction is context-dependent because the rule reverses conviction based on failure direction. Parameters: failure_confirmation_bars=1 (single bar rejection), position_reversal_speed=immediate (full reversal on confirmation). Volume confirmation not required per parameters.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal captures regime-shift reversal logic: entry conditions detect failed breakouts (price approaches pivot but closes opposite to prior bar with minimal body), indicating failed predictions. Exit conditions trigger when original thesis regains credibility (price crosses SMA_20). Direction is context-dependent because the rule reverses conviction based on failure direction. Parameters: failure_confirmation_bars=1 (single bar rejection), position_reversal_speed=immediate (full reversal on confirmation). Volume confirmation not required per parameters.

source_rule_text: Abandon initial market projections and reverse conviction when price action fails to follow through at anticipated levels and timeframes, treating failed predictions as evidence the market has shifted regime.
